Accessibility
Accessibility and inclusive design
Hero image — accessible UI patterns
Web accessibility ensures that websites and tools work for everyone, including people with disabilities. WCAG 2.2 and the POUR framework — Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust — provide the foundation for inclusive design.
Related resources
WCAG 2.2 quick reference
w3.org
Inclusive design principles
inclusivedesignprinciples.org
axe DevTools browser extension
deque.com
